hospitalizations.principal_dx_description: Malignant neoplasm of right kidney, except renal pelvis
hospitalizations.reason: Planned cytoreductive right radical nephrectomy with retroperitoneal lymph node dissection; postoperative course complicated by Grade 2 ileus requiring nasogastric decompression (POD 4-8)

medications.frequency: every 3 weeks x4 cycles, then every 4 weeks

medications.dose: 60 mg (reduced to 40 mg after 3 weeks for HFSR)

medications.frequency: as needed after loose stools, up to 8 mg/day

medications.dose: 5 mg (increased to 10 mg at 8 weeks on cabozantinib)
